detail.description:
HIGHWAY RACER PRO - The most realistic highway traffic racing game on mobile
Push your limits in the ultimate car racing game. Experience high-speed action on real highways, dodge through dense traffic, and become the king of the road.

DOMINATE THE HIGHWAY WITH REAL CARS
Jump into your dream car and hit the highway. With real car physics and ultra-detailed vehicles, every race feels extreme. Whether you’re driving a muscle car or a tuner, the traffic is your playground.

REAL HIGHWAYS, REAL TRA
detail.releaseNotes:
- Critical performance improvements to RAM & GPU usage.
- Tutorial is shorter and cleaner.
- Crash fixes.
- Fuel/Energy limit increased from 10 to 30.
- Input block in Validation mode fixed.
- Driver level-up and level-end animations are faster.
